series_metadata.series_description: Drug Test Notification Form submitted to testing facilities when a drug test is required for hire, reasonable suspicion, promotion, or job change.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep one year test date, in event of a positive test result keep all forms completion of testing program is complete ().
